message:
cli: Support auth via environment variables in CI

When AGENTLOGS_AUTH_TOKEN is set but no environments are configured,
create a synthetic environment using the token and server URL from
env vars (AGENTLOGS_SERVER_URL or SERVER_URL).

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/9afd6ff3-88fa-4935-a2a4-d2f50a85f2b8
